case_title: NELVIS ALBERTO REYES CRUZ VS. HERCILIA MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ, NELVIS ALBERTO REYES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, HERCILIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY CRUZ, NELVIS ALBERTO REYES AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, HERCILIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUZ, NELVIS ALBERTO REYES ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF NELVIS CRUZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER MARGO SEELY#301386. DEFENDANT HERCILIA MARTINEZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER MARGO SEELY#301386. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
COPYING FEES (14 PAGE) TWO SETS OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER AND PROOF OF SERVICE PAID BY PLAINTIFF CRUZ, NELVIS ALBERTO REYES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.
